advance financial well-being News Back Press Releases Speeches & Op-eds Testimony Statements Blog Director’s Notebook Recent Updates Consumer Advisories (855) 411-2372 Submit a complaint about a financial product or service Each week we send more than 100,000 complaints about financial products and services to companies for response.
If another agency would be better able to assist, we'll send it to them and let you know.
See how the complaint process works Watch this short video to find out what to include in your complaint and what will happen after you submit.

headings.text: Submit a complaint | Consumer Financial Protection Bureau

rules.text: We currently accept complaints about: Checking and savings accounts Credit cards Credit reports and other personal consumer reports Debt collection Debt and credit management Money transfers, virtual currency, and money services Mortgages Payday loans Personal loans like installment, advance, and title loans Prepaid cards Student loans Vehicle loans or leases If you don't see the product or service you want to complain about listed, check out usa.gov to find other places to submit complaints.
